zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Cantilupe於1235年出生在英國斯塔福爾塔沃斯時，她的父親William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo51歲，母親Millicent Gournay46歲。她去世於1285年8月6日在英國享年50歲。

zh-hans.This, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Franc: 法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯蒂斯
zh-hans.Leicestershire, England: 英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Cantilupe于1235年出生在英国斯塔福爾塔沃斯时，她的父亲William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo51岁，母亲Millicent Gournay46岁。她去世于1285年8月6日在英国享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Cantilupe was born in 1235, in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, her father, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, was 51 and her mother, Millicent Gournay, was 46. She died on 6 August 1285, in England, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Cantilupe est née en 1235, à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Millicent Gournay, avait 46 ans. Elle est décédée le 6 août 1285, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Cantilupe 1235 in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo 51 und ihre Mutter Millicent Gournay 46. Sie starb am 6. August 1285 im Alter von 50 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Cantilupe è nata il nel 1235 nel Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Millicent Gournay, aveva 46 anni. Morì il 6 agosto 1285, nel England, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.Warwickshire, England: イギリスワーウィクシュアイア

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Cantilupeが1235年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアタムウオルスで生まれた時，父William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Caunteloは51歳，母Millicent Gournayは46歳であった。彼女は1285年8月6日にイギリスで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Cantilupe(이)가 1235년 영국 스태퍼드실르 타워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Millicent Gournay(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 1285년 8월 6일 영국에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Leicestershire, England: Ratae Coritanorum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Cantilupe nasceu em 1235, em Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Millicent Gournay, tinha 46 anos. Ela faleceu em 6 de agosto de 1285, em Inglaterra, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Cantilupe родилась в 1235 г. в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Millicent Gournay, 46. Она умерла 6 августа 1285 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Cantilupe nació en 1235, en Tamworth, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Cantilupe 1st Lord Cauntelo, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Millicent Gournay, tenía 46 años. Murió el 6 de agosto de 1285, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años.
